title: Home blood pressure review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.
examination.rationale: Severe blood-pressure features were reviewed as prompts; no diagnosis or same-day referral is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.5.1-1.5.3 - severe hypertension and same-day specialist review features

medication.text: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.
medication.rationale: The monitoring section supports documenting self-monitoring, technique discussion, symptoms, medicine discussion, patient support, and arranged follow-up without generating targets or advice.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

follow_up.text: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.
follow_up.rationale: The NICE section supports documenting HBPM source, measurement schedule, discarded first day, averaged readings, clinic comparison, and clinician interpretation without automatically diagnosing hypertension.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1-1.2.13 - clinic, ambulatory, and home blood-pressure assessment

source_limitations: Device and calibration, cuff, technique, dates and times, rest, posture, arm, duplicate readings, first-day exclusion, averages, symptoms, adherence, clinic comparison, interpretation, diagnosis, target, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
